cafes.name: Green Tea House
cafes.quickNote: Exceptional ceremonial grade matcha from Uji, Japan
cafes.review: Exceptional matcha quality with a perfect balance of umami and sweetness. The ceremonial grade matcha is sourced directly from Uji, Japan. The baristas are knowledgeable and the preparation is meticulous. Smooth, creamy texture with no bitterness.
cafes.menuHighlights: Matcha latte ($6.50), Ceremonial matcha ($8), Matcha soft serve

cafes.name: Zen Matcha
cafes.quickNote: Premium matcha in a serene, minimalist setting

cafes.name: Matcha Bar
cafes.quickNote: Great value with solid matcha and trendy atmosphere

cafes.name: Leaf & Bean
cafes.quickNote: Cozy spot with creative matcha drinks and pastries

cafes.name: Koi Cafe
cafes.quickNote: Casual cafe with decent matcha and laid-back vibe

cafes.name: Sakura Matcha Studio
cafes.quickNote: Artisanal matcha with traditional Japanese preparation
cafes.review: Authentic Japanese matcha experience with master-level preparation. The ceremonial matcha is hand-whisked to perfection with imported bamboo tools. Beautiful presentation in authentic Japanese ceramics.
cafes.menuHighlights: Traditional ceremonial matcha ($12), Matcha wagashi set ($18), Premium matcha flight ($25)

cafes.name: Urban Leaf
cafes.quickNote: Hip spot with creative matcha fusion drinks
cafes.review: Modern take on matcha with creative fusion drinks. Their matcha bubble tea and matcha cheesecake are standouts. Great for younger crowds looking for Instagram-worthy drinks.
cafes.menuHighlights: Matcha bubble tea ($7), Matcha cheesecake ($8), Iced matcha lemonade ($6.50)

cafes.name: Jade Garden Tea
cafes.quickNote: Traditional tea house with solid matcha selection
cafes.review: Family-owned tea house with extensive tea selection including several matcha grades. More traditional approach with less focus on trendy drinks but solid quality.
cafes.menuHighlights: Matcha latte ($5.50), Traditional matcha tea ($7), Matcha mochi ($4)

cafes.name: Moss & Stone
cafes.quickNote: Cozy study spot with consistently good matcha
cafes.review: Perfect study cafe with reliable wifi and consistently prepared matcha. Popular with students and remote workers. Their matcha oat milk latte is particularly well-balanced.
cafes.menuHighlights: Matcha oat milk latte ($6.75), Iced matcha ($6), Matcha croissant ($5.50)

news.title: New Spot Alert: Zen Matcha in Yorkville
news.preview: Just discovered this hidden gem in Yorkville! Premium ceremonial matcha in a beautifully minimalist space.

news.title: Updated Review: Green Tea House
news.preview: Revisited this Downtown favorite and they've upped their game with a new seasonal matcha blend.

news.title: Fall Matcha Season Is Here!
news.preview: Many cafes are introducing autumn-inspired matcha drinks. Keep an eye out for pumpkin matcha lattes and hojicha specials.
